title: Remove token-heavy scorecard listing from export migration procedure

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Starting fix: remove broad scorecards_list observe stage and replace with targeted exact scorecard existence checks to reduce token usage and chatter.

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Implemented targeted scorecard existence check using plexus_scorecard_info (key then name fallback). Removed broad scorecards_list lookup from execution path. Verified YAML loads and procedure YAML loader test passes.
